description: List of items in a mixture of Judaeo-Arabic, Ladino, and Hebrew. The dating is 15th- or 16th-century based on the paleography. Many of the items are textiles or clothing: "ṭalīt qaṭan", "Franjī cloth robe," "Franjī handkerchiefs," belts, among many others. MCD.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
